utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: We were playing Gin ? You know if we were a couple , we could play this game naked .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay , all right , I think you are great , I think you are sweet , and you are smart , and I love you .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: But you will always be the guy who peed on me .
